mnemonics: PICKLE jar stores Python objects for later (Pickle saves objects to a file for future use)
keyPoints: Pickle is used for serializing and deserializing Python object structures
It converts complex objects into a byte stream for storage or transmission
The pickle module provides functions like pickle.dump() to save and pickle.load() to retrieve objects
commonMistakes: Trying to unpickle data from untrusted sources (security risk)
Forgetting to open files in binary mode ('wb' for writing, 'rb' for reading)
Assuming pickled objects are compatible across different Python versions
